"'''Jedi Mind Tricks'''" was an ongoing feature in the ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'' magazine consisting of a quiz or puzzle.

==Star Wars Gamer 8==
A [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and [[Sector/Legends|sector]] (50) word search by [[Michael Selinker|Mike Selinker]]. Image of the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Nien Nunb/Legends|Nien Nunb]] by [[Scott Morse]].
